unit.name: WP_Http request blocked request decision
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This candidate promotes only the WP_Http::request decision that a true WP_Http::block_request result takes the blocked-request WP_Error branch. PHP still owns public WP_Http::request ABI, URL filtering/parsing, invalid-url handling, WP_Http::block_request execution and policy, WP_Error construction, translation/sprintf, http_api_debug action payload/timing, Requests dispatch avoidance, and native arrays/objects.

bridge.removal_gate: Temporary copied public PHP shell retired for this bounded branch; full WP_Http::request ownership still requires request orchestration, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network parity gates.
